requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Island Grid Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——岛屿电网项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——島嶼電網項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: No standalone Sao Tome and Principe EMC technical regulation specifically for solar PV inverters has been confirmed. For grid-tied, donor-backed, or owner-engineer-reviewed PV projects, exporters should expect IEC-based EMC and power-quality evidence, especially IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, surge, conducted-emission, and radiated-emission testing. Sao Tome and Principe's small island grid and solar-plus-storage interest make power-quality review important even where no published national inverter certification list exists. Test evidence should cover the exact model, power rating, firmware configuration, input/output filters, and 50 Hz / 230/400 V operating assumptions used for the project.
summary.zh: 尚未确认圣多美和普林西比存在专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC技术法规。对于并网、捐助方支持或由业主工程师审查的光伏项目，出口商应预期需要IEC体系的EMC和电能质量证据，尤其是针对光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度、浪涌、传导发射和辐射发射测试。圣多美和普林西比的小型岛屿电网以及太阳能加储能需求，使电能质量审查即使在没有公开国家逆变器认证清单时也很重要。测试证据应覆盖项目使用的具体型号、功率等级、固件配置、输入/输出滤波器以及50 Hz / 230/400 V运行假设。
summary.zht: 尚未確認聖多美和普林西比存在專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC技術法規。對於併網、捐助方支持或由業主工程師審查的光伏項目，出口商應預期需要IEC體系的EMC和電能品質證據，尤其是針對光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度、浪湧、傳導發射和輻射發射測試。聖多美和普林西比的小型島嶼電網以及太陽能加儲能需求，使電能品質審查即使在沒有公開國家逆變器認證清單時也很重要。測試證據應覆蓋項目使用的具體型號、功率等級、韌體配置、輸入/輸出濾波器以及50 Hz / 230/400 V運行假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-series EMC immunity, surge, flicker, conducted-emission, and radiated-emission test methods as specified by the project owner or engineer
Project-specific EMAE, donor, lender, EPC, or owner-engineer power-quality requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is commonly assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 and related China domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. These documents can demonstrate domestic product quality but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 compliance evidence for Sao Tome and Principe projects. Chinese EMC testing is typically performed against China grid assumptions of 220/380 V at 50 Hz; Sao Tome and Principe uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz, so harmonic and power-quality evidence may need confirmation under the project operating voltage.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关中国国内测试方法，在CNAS认可实验室进行评估。这些文件可证明国内产品质量，但不会自动被接受为圣多美和普林西比项目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000合规证据。中国EMC测试通常基于50 Hz、220/380 V中国电网假设；圣多美和普林西比使用50 Hz、230/400 V，因此谐波和电能质量证据可能需要在项目运行电压下确认。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關中國國內測試方法，在CNAS認可實驗室進行評估。這些文件可證明國內產品品質，但不會自動被接受為聖多美和普林西比項目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000合規證據。中國EMC測試通常基於50 Hz、220/380 V中國電網假設；聖多美和普林西比使用50 Hz、230/400 V，因此諧波和電能品質證據可能需要在項目運行電壓下確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
CNAS-accredited China laboratory EMC reports under domestic PV inverter certification programmes

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T EMC evidence does not automatically satisfy IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence expected by donor, lender, EMAE-facing, or owner-engineer project reviews. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports from an accredited laboratory for the exact inverter configuration. For weak or island-grid installations, confirm harmonic current, flicker, voltage-dip ride-through interactions, surge immunity, conducted emissions, and radiated emissions at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. Coastal salt-mist and high humidity can degrade filters, connectors, and enclosures, so EMC evidence should be paired with environmental derating and corrosion-control documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC证据不会自动满足捐助方、贷款方、面向EMAE或业主工程师项目审查所预期的IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。出口商应为具体逆变器配置准备来自认可实验室的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告。对于弱电网或岛屿电网安装，应确认在230/400 V、50 Hz下的谐波电流、闪变、电压跌落穿越相互影响、浪涌抗扰度、传导发射和辐射发射。沿海盐雾和高湿度可能劣化滤波器、连接器和外壳，因此EMC证据应与环境降额和防腐文件配套。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC證據不會自動滿足捐助方、貸款方、面向EMAE或業主工程師項目審查所預期的IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。出口商應為具體逆變器配置準備來自認可實驗室的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告。對於弱電網或島嶼電網安裝，應確認在230/400 V、50 Hz下的諧波電流、閃變、電壓跌落穿越相互影響、浪湧抗擾度、傳導發射和輻射發射。沿海鹽霧和高濕度可能劣化濾波器、連接器和外殼，因此EMC證據應與環境降額和防腐文件配套。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed standalone national EMC certification route; mandatory in practice where EMAE, a donor, lender, EPC, or owner engineer requires IEC EMC and power-quality evidence for project acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or programme-specific for China domestic PV inverter certification; not transferable as Sao Tome and Principe IEC EMC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408-2021 EMC certificates alone for Sao Tome and Principe projects. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the exact inverter model and configuration, and confirm with EMAE, the donor/lender, or the owner engineer whether 230/400 V island-grid conditions require additional testing. Pair EMC files with humidity, salt-mist, and enclosure derating evidence before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021 EMC证书用于圣多美和普林西比项目。应为具体逆变器型号和配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据，并与EMAE、捐助方/贷款方或业主工程师确认230/400 V岛屿电网条件是否需要额外测试。出货前，应将EMC文件与湿度、盐雾和外壳降额证据配套。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021 EMC證書用於聖多美和普林西比項目。應為具體逆變器型號和配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據，並與EMAE、捐助方/貸款方或業主工程師確認230/400 V島嶼電網條件是否需要額外測試。出貨前，應將EMC文件與濕度、鹽霧和外殼降額證據配套。
